subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1912-05-13
subcodes.first_line: Although I say always that I am ‘Abdu'l-Baha, a servant of God, still people refer to me as a messenger and a prophet. It would be better if they would not attribute such titles to me.
subcodes.first_line_orig: هر چه ما میگوئیم بندهٴخد‌ا عبدالبها هستیم باز مردم ما را باسم پیغمبر
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha
